message:
refactor(web): add focus-visible and touch polish to corpus page

Extends the focus-visible and touch interaction improvements to the
corpus index page, completing the accessibility polish pass.

Changes:
- Model tab buttons: Add focus-visible:ring with inset positioning
- Document cards (grid view): Add active:scale-[0.98], touch-manipulation,
  and focus-visible:ring for keyboard/touch feedback
- Document rows (list view): Add active:scale-[0.98], touch-manipulation,
  and focus-visible:ring with inset for list items
- Category pills: Add focus-visible:ring with offset styling
- "Clear filters" button: Add active:scale-[0.98], touch-manipulation,
  and focus-visible:ring with offset

All buttons/links now provide consistent visual feedback for:
- Keyboard navigation (focus-visible ring)
- Touch interactions (active scale, touch-manipulation)
- Mouse hover (unchanged, existing styles)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.1","title":"Decide minimal session artifact storage layout","description":"# Goal
Decide where session artifacts live in the repo (minimize file sprawl) *and* make the location derivable from the thread id.

This must align with:
- thread id conventions (brenner_bot-5so.1.4.1)
- cockpit mapping (brenner_bot-5so.9.1.1)

---

# Design constraints
- Explicit writes only (no surprise persistence).
- Minimal sprawl (prefer 1–2 files per session).
- Deterministic paths derived from `thread_id`.

---

# Candidate layout
- `sessions/<thread_id>.md` (single-file)
- or `sessions/<thread_id>/artifact.md` (+ optional `sessions/index.md`)

---

# Acceptance
- Layout chosen and documented.
- Given a thread id, an operator can predict the path.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:24:59.407526587-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:44:25.04599649-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T21:44:25.04599649-05:00","close_reason":"Chose canonical artifact path artifacts/{thread_id}.md and documented it in thread_subject_conventions_v0.1.md","labels":["design","persistence"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:24:59.408375786-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.1.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:33:41.681203436-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.1.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:09:26.222911406-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

- update any index

Creates directory, shows lint report.","labels":["git","persistence"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:24:59.440967777-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:33:41.711258462-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.3.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:33:41.740600856-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
